company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream provides automated AI-powered video editing tools for content creators.

policies.refund: No refunds are provided after 7 days of purchase.
policies.support_hours: 24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users get email support during business hours only.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.
policies.free_trial: AutoStream does not currently offer a free trial, but you can upgrade or downgrade plans at any time.

features.ai_captions: Automatically generate accurate captions for your videos using AI (Pro plan only).
features.auto_editing: Smart scene detection and automated cut editing available on both plans.
features.templates: Access to 50+ professionally designed video templates.
features.cloud_storage: All videos are stored in the cloud for 30 days on Basic, unlimited on Pro.
features.export_formats: Export in MP4, MOV, and WebM formats on both plans.
